subject: Swift Triggers 1209371 through 1209374 are not astrophysical events
body:
K. L. Page (U Leicester) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift
Observatory Team:

Following on from GCN Circular 35552, we confirm that Swift triggers
1209371, 1209372, 1209373 and 1209374 (trigger times between
2024-01-17 07:57 and 08:22 UT) were also caused by the star tracker
loss-of-lock event, and are not interesting astrophysical events.
